description: Product SpecificationsBreathable mesh upper Light weight phylon midsoleCarbon rubber outsole for gripWash CareClean with a soft, damp cloth and brush surface to remove dust. No machine wash.These premium reebok shoes provide an irritation-free Fit. The reebok Silver sports shoes come with cushioned soles that provide traction and durability. The mesh upper provides support and flexibility by moving with the natural motion of your feet. Ideal for running, walking, Sports and fitness activities.
